eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Midway Islands, US Pacific Islands; at 02:40 AM ON FEB 19, 2026 Effective until 03:40 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The IPAWS Program Management Office is performing a TEST of the Emergency Alert System. No action is required. This is only a TEST
